source: CI/CD + Cloud Console UX work from PR #1. Run: LINEAR_API_KEY=xxx node scripts/linear/create-issues.mjs --input docs/backlog/ci-console-ux-tickets.json --team-key ANM

tickets.title: [X Platform] CI/CD gating and Cloud Console UX
tickets.description:
## Summary
Parent ticket for DevEx CI/CD and Cloud Console UX changes. PR: https://github.com/anmho/x/pull/1

## Scope
- GitHub Actions workflows (ci.yml, deploy-preflight.yml)
- scripts/verify and deploy-preflight behavior
- Cloud Console: cmdk, project switcher, Temporal link, theme mode, API keys routes, notification datetime, deployments, Settings, Templates

tickets.title: [X Platform] CI/CD workflows and verify gates
tickets.description:
## Scope
GitHub Actions: ci.yml (platform, apps, docs jobs), deploy-preflight.yml. scripts/verify and deploy-preflight behavior. .gitignore, PR template, runbooks for Node/workflow gates.

## Risk
Medium — changes CI/CD gating (new workflows)

tickets.title: [X Platform] Cloud Console navigation and UX
tickets.description:
## Scope
nx.json defaults, cloud-console Nx config. cmdk command palette, project switcher, external Temporal UI link, theme mode quick setting. Settings and Templates pages (including fake-data fallback).

tickets.title: [X Platform] Access API proxy routes for API keys
tickets.description:
## Scope
Cloud Console server routes: list/mint/revoke API keys via Access API. Fail-fast on missing ACCESS_API_ADMIN_KEY.

## Risk
Medium — depends on ACCESS_API_ADMIN_KEY being correctly configured

tickets.title: [X Platform] Notification datetime and deployment metrics
tickets.description:
## Scope
Notification creation: schedule sends with datetime. Deployments/status metrics expansion.
